info.name: Photo Organizer
info.summary: Find duplicates and classify photos in your Nextcloud storage
info.description:
**Photo Organizer** scans your image library for exact duplicate files and automatically classifies images into categories for easier management.
### Features
#### Duplicate Detection - **Non-destructive scanning** — original files are never altered automatically. - **Content-based detection** — uses SHA-256 hashes to find byte-identical copies. - **Streaming hashing** — handles large files without excessive memory usage. - **Duplicate review UI** — side-by-side thumbnails with path, size, and date info. - **Individual and bulk delete** — remove duplicates one at a time or in batch. - **Keep button** — keep one copy and delete all other duplicates in one click. - **Background scanning** — periodic cron job keeps the duplicate index up to date. - **Real-time updates** — file creation, modification, and deletion events are tracked. - **OCC command** — trigger scans from the command line.
#### Image Classifier - **Automatic classification** — sorts images into five categories using EXIF metadata, dimensions, filename patterns, and compression analysis. - **Categories** — Documents/Screenshots, Memes/Social Media, Nature/Landscapes, Family/People, Objects/Other. - **Confidence scores** — each classification includes a confidence indicator. - **Move files** — reorganize images into folders directly from the classifier view. - **Delete unwanted images** — remove clutter like memes or screenshots easily.
Deleted files are moved to the Nextcloud trash bin (if enabled), so recovery is possible.
info.author: Johannes
